installCommand: if [ -d client ]; then cd client && npm ci --include=dev && cd ../server && npm ci --include=dev; elif [ -d ../client ]; then current=$(basename "$PWD"); if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then npm ci --include=dev; fi; if [ "$current" = "server" ]; then cd ../client && npm ci --include=dev; elif [ "$current" = "client" ] && [ -d ../server ]; then cd ../server && npm ci --include=dev; fi; else npm ci --include=dev; fi
buildCommand: if [ -d client ]; then cd client && npm run build && cd .. && rm -rf dist && cp -R client/dist dist && cd server && npm run prisma:generate; elif [ -d ../client ]; then current=$(basename "$PWD"); if [ "$current" = "server" ]; then cd ../client && npm run build && cd ../server && rm -rf dist && cp -R ../client/dist dist && npm run prisma:generate; elif [ "$current" = "client" ]; then npm run build && if [ -d ../server ]; then cd ../server && npm run prisma:generate; fi; else npm run build; fi; else npm run build; fi
